user.title: Vimar By-Me Hub Setup
user.description: Configure your Vimar By-me web server connection.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Vimar By-Me Hub
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for {host} are no longer valid. Please enter your updated credentials.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Please check your credentials.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Vimar web server. Check host, port, and network connectivity.
error.invalid_cert: SSL certificate validation failed. Check certificate configuration or disable SSL verification.
error.save_cert_failed: Failed to save SSL certificate. Check file permissions.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check logs for more details.

abort.already_configured: This Vimar web server is already configured.
abort.reauth_successful: Re-authentication successful! Your integration has been updated.
abort.reauth_failed: Re-authentication failed. Please try again or reconfigure the integration.
abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Vimar integration instance is allowed.
